rulings.Case Title: VICTORIA L PETERSON VS. LUIS ADAME et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Comply With Defendant'S Ccp 724.050 Demand, And For Payment Of Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 9, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANT LUIS ADAME'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Comply With Defendant's Ccp 724.050 Demand, And For Payment Of Sanctions. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH DEFENDANT'S CCP 724.050 DEMAND IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MUST CASH THE $798.00 CHECK AND FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF MUST PAY DEFENDANT A $100 MANDATORY FEE FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND TO THE 724.050 DEMAND. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN S. KAO VS. UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Computers And Backup Data For Examination
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 9, 2011, line 4. PLAINTIFF JOHN KAO'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Computers And Backup Data For Examination. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF COMPUTERS AND BACK UP DATA OF JENNIFER TURPIN'S COMPUTER IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST PRODUCE THE COMPUTER AND BACK UP DATA, EVEN IF IT NEEDS TO IMMEDIATELY REPURCHASE THE COMPUTER AND RESTORE THE HARD DRIVE AT ITS OWN EXPENSE. IF THE COMPUTER, HARD DRIVE OR INFORMATION CONTAINED THEREIN CANNOT BE RECOVERED THE PLAINTIFF SHOULD BRING A MOTION FOR SANCTIONS. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JILL TOUPS VS. HONG BING CHEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 9, 2011, line 6. PLAINTIFF JILL TOUPS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's motion for Summary Adjudication is granted as to the First and Second causes of action. The parties agree that the facts of this case are undisputed, including the amount in dispute ($83,000). Plaintiff has met its burden of proving the elements of unjust enrichments of unjust enrichment and involuntary trust. While Defendant may be entitled to attorney fees under the "tort of another" doctrine, the court cannot determine this on a MSA/MSJ because the specific amount of fees is in dispute. This should be brought in a separate motion for fees and costs. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JEEBA ABBEYQUAYE VS. CHARLES BELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 9, 2011, line 7. DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE BELL, DAVID BELL, MARY BELL AND SHARON BELL'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant¿s Demurrer to the 1st cause of action (negligence) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must separate out the negligent hiring cause of action from the other negligence claim. Defendant¿s Demurrer to the 3rd ¿ 6th causes of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must specifically plead the specifics of the contract or attached the contract to the complaint. Defendant¿s Demurrer to the 8th cause of action (nuisance) is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has previous had an opportunity to adequately amend this claim but has failed to do so. Defendant¿s Demurrer to the 9th, 10th and 11th causes of action for (IIED, Violation of the SF Rent Ordinance, and Unfair Business Practices) are without leave to amend. Plaintiff has been provided opportunities to sufficiently allege facts to support its claims malice or bad faith and has failed to do so. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JEEBA ABBEYQUAYE VS. CHARLES BELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 9, 2011, line 7. DEFENDANT CHRISTINE BELL, DAVID BELL, MARY BELL AND SHARON BELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant¿s Motion to Strike the prayers for punitive damages and treble damages is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff cannot plead facts to support a claim for the requisite malice or bad faith. Further the Motion to Strike the prayer for attorney fees pursuant to the SF Rent Ordinance is sustained without leave to amend. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE MERINO VS. SAXON MORTGAGE, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 9, 2011, line 9. DEFENDANT SAXON MORTGAGE SERVICES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to the 2nd through 9th, 11th through 14th and 16th and 17th causes of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts sufficient to support these causes of action. Plaintiff's current pleading is conclusory and not fact specific. Defendant's Demurrer to the 10th cause of action for Violation of the Rosenthal Act is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant is not a debt collector and foreclosure is not considered a collection procedure under California case law. Defendant's Demurrer to the 15th causes of action for Violation of CCP §2934(d) and (e) is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant's is correct that Defendant does not lack standing to bring a nonjudicial foreclosure. Defendant's Demurrer to the 10th and 15th causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant is Rescission and Declaratory relief can be based on Plaintiff's claim of a violation of CC§1632. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER L. ERICSON VS. INGRID & ISABEL LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Evidentiary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 9, 2011, line 2. DEFENDANT INGRID & ISABEL LLC'S Motion For Evidentiary Sanctions. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO TURN OVER ANY MATERIALS OR COPIES OF MATERIALS FROM MS. CARNEY'S JOURNAL. PLAINTIFF IS FURTHER PROHIBITED FROM USING THE INFORMATION CONTAINED IN THE JOURNAL FOR ANY PURPOSE OR DISCOVERY. FURTHER ANY INFORMATION DERIVED EXCLUSIVELY FROM USE OF THE JOURNAL IS PROHIBITED FROM USE BY PLAINTIFF FOR ANY PURPOSE. PLAIINTIFF'S FAILURE TO TIMELY RETURN THE JOURNAL TO MS. CARNEY TWO YEARS AGO AMOUNTS TO CONVERSION OF THAT PROPERTY. =(302/LMG)
